diagrams.title: API Request Flow Through Capacity Components
diagrams.description: Shows how an API request passes through various capacity management components from client to backend
diagrams.purpose: Understanding where capacity bottlenecks can occur and how to optimize each stage

diagrams.title: Multi-Level Caching Architecture
diagrams.description: Illustrates caching at different layers to reduce backend load
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how each cache layer reduces downstream resource consumption

diagrams.title: Rate Limiting Algorithm Comparison
diagrams.description: Compares Token Bucket and Leaky Bucket algorithms for rate limiting
diagrams.purpose: Choosing appropriate rate limiting strategy based on traffic patterns

diagrams.title: Circuit Breaker State Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the three states of circuit breaker pattern
diagrams.purpose: Implementing resilience to prevent cascading failures in API systems

diagrams.title: API Versioning Impact on Capacity
diagrams.description: Shows capacity requirements when supporting multiple API versions
diagrams.purpose: Planning capacity for API lifecycle management and deprecation strategies
